name: Package identifier
description: The identifier code of the package in each of the reports of a component transaction in a package.
optionalityRules: Conditionally required or if applicable for NEWT, MODI, CORR, REVI (Paragraph 524).
May be optionally reported for conditionally required Action types (Paragraph 536(a)(i)).
Not reported for TERM, EROR, PRTO (Paragraph 524).
